description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy that runs on push to the master branch and on a weekly schedule every Monday. Use a matrix strategy to build and deploy images across multiple Python versions, including 3.11, 3.10, 3.9, 3.8, 3.7, and 3.8-alpine. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies with pip, and deploy the image using a bash script and Docker.
